content:
# Underbalanced Drilling

**Summary**: A drilling technique where the hydrostatic pressure of the drilling fluid is maintained below the formation pore pressure.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-gowida|Gowida, 2024]] investigated underbalanced drilling (UBD) as a primary application for foam fluids.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-gowida|Gowida, 2024]] UBD is used in depleted and fractured formations to improve well productivity.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- rheology-measurement

## Key Findings Across Sources

- UBD can lead to higher rates of penetration (ROP), minimal formation damage, and reduced circulation losses. ([[2024-gowida|Gowida, 2024, p. 23]])
